quote: Not all laughter means the same thing. Sometimes the body is just trying to remember how to breathe.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
socialPost:
Laughter can be a gentle reminder of our humanity, a moment to pause and reconnect with the breath of life. Embrace each giggle as a step toward joy and presence.

https://blog.revrandylewis.com/whos-laughing-now/

#Grief #Healing #Hope #Humanity #LaughingThroughIt
